answers: Negotiation tactics are strategies used to reach a favorable agreement, including anchoring (setting the first offer), active listening, finding win-win solutions, and knowing when to walk away.
Negotiation e jittar jonno preparation most important. Tomar bottom line jano, opor pakkher need bujho, confident thako, ar first offer tumi dao.
For salary negotiation, research market rates, highlight your achievements, practice your pitch, be willing to negotiate beyond just salary (benefits, remote work), and always get offers in writing.
Key negotiation rules: prepare thoroughly, listen more than you talk, aim for win-win outcomes, never accept the first offer, use silence strategically, and always have a BATNA (best alternative).
